metadata.description: Blender Cycles light path information - completely unavailable in real-time

summary: Blender LightPath outputs ray type information (direct, indirect, diffuse, glossy, etc.) from renderer. No real-time equivalent exists.
blender_use: Used in Cycles to implement context-dependent shading (different appearance depending on how ray was traced)
why_impossible: Real-time rendering doesn't track ray history
No shader access to renderer statistics
recommended_action: REMOVE this node - use constant values or material properties instead
compatibility_loss_100_percent: Completely incompatible - remove from shader graph
